riverbank_slip.text: The bank gives under one foot. You catch the alder roots, but your ankle folds hard beneath you.
riverbank_slip.warning: Rain has left the riverbank slick and undercut.

platform_pull.text: For one impossible second the dark beyond the platform seems nearer than the platform edge. You stagger back too late and strike the bench hard.
platform_pull.warning: The platform edge is difficult to judge in the dark.

night_road_collision.text: Headlights appear where the road was empty. There is no time to understand the distance before the impact.
night_road_collision.warning: Engines carry strangely on the road after dark.

quarry_loose_stone.text: Loose limestone shifts underfoot on the terrace. You catch yourself badly against the rock face.
quarry_loose_stone.warning: The quarry terraces are uneven and loose stone gathers near the edges.

cave_disorientation.text: The return passage seems to fork where you remember one route. In the confusion you strike the low roof hard.
cave_disorientation.warning: Distances and echoes are difficult to judge beyond the first chamber.
